name: Almond Snowcap Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, cream the margarine and powdered sugar until light.
2. Blend in the flour.
3. Press evenly over the bottom of a 9 x 13 inch pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-16 minutes, or until set.
5. Spread jam over hot baked crust.
6. In another bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy.
7. Continue to beat, adding granulated sugar one tablespoon at a time, until the egg whites form soft peaks and are glossy.
8. Fold in half of the sliced almonds.
9. Spread over the jam layer.
10. Sprinkle with remaining nuts and shredded coconut.
11. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional 12-16 minutes, or until set.
12. Cool, then cut into bars.
Makes 24 bars
